title: Register GoJS License Key for DataToolsPro.com Domain
description:
## Context
GoJS was purchased for the ERD diagram feature. The license key must be activated and inserted into the code before creating any Diagram instance to remove the evaluation watermark.

## Action
Activate the GoJS license key for the datatoolspro.com domain and insert the `go.Diagram.licenseKey` assignment into the codebase so it executes after GoJS loads but before any diagram is created.

## Key Details
- License key is domain-specific (*.datatoolspro.com)
- Key is version-specific: works for all patch versions within the same minor version (e.g., 2.3.*), but requires a new key when upgrading minor/major versions (e.g., 2.3 to 2.4 or 3.0).
acceptance_criteria: GoJS evaluation watermark is removed from all diagrams
License key executes before any Diagram instance is created
Key is registered for the datatoolspro.com domain
ux_changes: Removed GoJS evaluation watermark from diagram pages.
implementation_notes: GoJS license key is version-locked to minor versions. Must be renewed when upgrading GoJS minor or major versions. Key assignment must execute after GoJS library load but before first Diagram creation.
comment_summary: Developer asked how to obtain the license. Reporter provided the key. Developer inserted it and confirmed the watermark was removed.
